title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们呈现了对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155（z=0.336）的强透镜（SL）分析，这是首个已知被发现拥有两个不同多重成像Ia型超新星（SNe）的透镜星系团：SN Requiem和SN Encore。这两个瞬变事件均位于z=1.949处的大质量、多重成像红色星系MRG-M0138中。该星系团的投影总质量已通过几个独立的透镜模型（Suyu+26; Pierel+26）进行了研究，这些模型使用了来自8个背景源（0.767<z<3.420）的23个光谱确认的多重图像样本，这些图像源自HST和JWST成像数据以及VLT/MUSE光谱。在这项工作中，我们基于一个新的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl开发了一个新的SL模型，利用了相同的SL数据集。我们的参考质量模型精确地再现了观测到的图像位置，图像平面均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。假设H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc，我们预测了高度延迟的SNe对应图像的未来重现时间，发现SN Encore的Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} 天（2032年5月至9月），SN Requiem的Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} 天（2027年2月至7月）。通过允许H0变化，并利用SN Encore和SN Requiem的测量时间延迟及其统计不确定性作为观测量，我们联合推断出H0的值以及其他透镜模型自由参数。通过此分析，我们获得了H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc的新测量值，与前述独立透镜模型推断的值一致。该误差目前由测量时间延迟的大相对不确定性（>10%）主导。SN Requiem即将到来的重现为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机会，前提是透镜模型系统误差得到控制。这些结果确立了M0138作为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学测量的首要锚点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，MRG-M0138星系是精密星团尺度时间延迟宇宙学测量的优质锚点；SN Requiem即将在2027年再次出现，若透镜模型系统误差可控，将显著提升哈勃常数约束精度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : M0138 observed with the JWST. The colour composite is constructed from the following filter combinations: F115W \(+\) F150W in blue, F200W \(+\) F277W in green, and F356W \(+\) F444W in red. The locations of the “gold” multiple-image systems are marked with circles (Ertl et al., 2025 ; Suyu et al., 2026 ) . SN Encore corresponds to System 1, while SN Requiem corresponds to System 2. The foreground (FG) and background (BG) galaxies are indicated by green circles. The three jellyfish galaxies are marked with cyan circles and labelled JF1, JF2, and JF3.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用JWST观测的M0138。彩色合成图由以下滤光片组合构建：F115W \(+\) F150W（蓝色），F200W \(+\) F277W（绿色），以及F356W \(+\) F444W（红色）。“金色”多重图像系统的位置用圆圈标记（Ertl等人，2025；Suyu等人，2026）。SN Encore对应系统1，而SN Requiem对应系统2。前景（FG）和背景（BG）星系用绿色圆圈表示。三个水母星系用青色圆圈标记，并标注为JF1、JF2和JF3。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Calibration of the Faber–Jackson relation for cluster members from Acebron et al. ( 2025 ) . The circles show the measured stellar velocity dispersions of 14 bright cluster galaxies as a function of their total HST F160W magnitude. Points are colour-coded by the average spectral signal-to-noise ratio reported by Granata et al. ( 2025 ) . The reference galaxy used in the scaling relation is the BCG ( \(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) , \(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\) ). The orange line and shaded region show the median \(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\) relation and its \(68\%\) confidence interval derived from the stellar kinematic measurements, following the procedure described in Sect. 3.4.2 . The blue line and shaded region show the corresponding relation predicted by the SL model.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Acebron等人（2025）的星系团成员Faber–Jackson关系校准。圆圈显示了14个明亮星系团星系的测量恒星速度色散与其总HST F160W星等的关系。点根据Granata等人（2025）报告的平均光谱信噪比进行颜色编码。标度关系中使用的参考星系是BCG（\(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)，\(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\)）。橙色线和阴影区域显示了根据第3.4.2节描述的程序，从恒星运动学测量得出的中位数\(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\)关系及其\(68\%\)置信区间。蓝色线和阴影区域显示了SL模型预测的相应关系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the best-fit SL models for M0138. 4 4 4 Summary of the SL models and their overall performance. The columns report the model name, the number of free parameters explicitly varied in the lens model, \(N_{par}\) , the number of observational constraints, \(N_{const}\) , the number of degrees of freedom, d.o.f., the minimum total chi-square value, \(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\) , the positional contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\) , the time-delay contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\) (where the two terms denote the contributions from SN Encore and SN Requiem, respectively), the minimum chi-square value per degree-of-freedom \(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\) , the \(\Delta_{{rms}}\) value, and the mean Gelman–Rubin convergence statistic, \(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\) , of the MCMC chains. The number of degrees of freedom is computed as \({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\) , where \(N_{src}=8\) is the number of independent source families, each contributing two source-plane coordinates that are marginalised over as nuisance parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：M0138的最佳拟合SL模型总结。4 4 4 SL模型及其整体性能总结。列报告了模型名称、透镜模型中显式变化的自由参数数量\(N_{par}\)、观测约束数量\(N_{const}\)、自由度数量d.o.f.、最小总卡方值\(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\)、总卡方值的位置贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\)、总卡方值的时间延迟贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\)（其中两项分别表示来自SN Encore和SN Requiem的贡献）、每自由度最小卡方值\(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\)、\(\Delta_{{rms}}\)值以及MCMC链的平均Gelman–Rubin收敛统计量\(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\)。自由度计算为\({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\)，其中\(N_{src}=8\)是独立源族的数量，每个源族贡献两个作为 nuisance 参数被边缘化的源平面坐标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Positional offsets between the observed and model-predicted multiple images in MACS J0138. The circles mark the observed image positions, while the arrows indicate the direction and magnitude of the offsets toward the corresponding model-predicted positions. For visual clarity, the arrow lengths have been magnified by a factor of ten relative to the true positional offsets. The \((0,0)\) point corresponds to the position of the BCG. The background contours show the total projected mass distribution obtained from the best-fitting lens model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MACS J0138中观测到的多重图像与模型预测位置之间的位置偏移。圆圈标记观测到的图像位置，箭头指示朝向相应模型预测位置的偏移方向和大小。为视觉清晰起见，箭头长度相对于真实位置偏移放大了十倍。\((0,0)\)点对应BCG的位置。背景等高线显示了从最佳拟合透镜模型获得的总投影质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison between the observed and model-predicted SB distribution of the multiply imaged host galaxy MRG-M0138. The left panel shows the observed BCG-subtracted JWST F200W image, while the right panel shows the image-plane prediction obtained by lensing the best-fitting Sérsic model of the background source through the reference H0_fixed mass model. The Sérsic source-light parameters were optimised using the pixels associated with the arc hosting multiple image 3c, while the remaining counter-images were predicted a posteriori and were not included in the light-profile optimisation. The two insets on the right show the normalised residuals, clipped to the range \([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\) , for the two regions highlighted by the dashed blue boxes in the model-prediction panel. Residuals associated with host-galaxy images 3d and 3e are omitted because of the contamination from the BCG. Red circles mark the observed multiple images of MRG-M0138 (left panel), listed in Table 4 in Ertl et al. ( 2025 ) , while the red boxes in the right panel correspond to the predicted positions. The blue cross in the right panel shows the predicted position of the host galaxy in the source plane. Coordinates are given in arcseconds relative to the BCG ( \({RA}=24.51570318\) deg, \({Dec}=-21.92547911\) deg).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：多重成像宿主星系MRG-M0138的观测与模型预测表面亮度分布比较。左图显示了观测到的减去BCG后的JWST F200W图像，而右图显示了通过将背景源的最佳拟合Sérsic模型通过参考H0_fixed质量模型进行透镜成像得到的图像平面预测。Sérsic源光参数是使用与弧（包含多重图像3c）相关的像素优化的，而其余对应图像是事后预测的，并未包含在光轮廓优化中。右侧的两个插图显示了归一化残差，裁剪到范围\([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\)，对应于模型预测面板中虚线蓝色框突出的两个区域。由于BCG的污染，省略了与宿主星系图像3d和3e相关的残差。红色圆圈标记了MRG-M0138的观测多重图像（左图），列于Ertl等人（2025）的表4中，而右图中的红色方框对应于预测位置。右图中的蓝色十字显示了宿主星系在源平面中的预测位置。坐标以相对于BCG的角秒给出（\({RA}=24.51570318\)度，\({Dec}=-21.92547911\)度）。

Images marked with * are model-predicted images that have not been detected to date, either because of their faintness, as for image 1c, or because of their long predicted time delays, as for images 1d, 1e, 2d, and 2e. Image 1e of SN Encore and image 2e of SN Requiem, marked with † , are predicted in \(47\%\) and \(34\%\) of the posterior samples, respectively; all other images are predicted in all samples. The reference anchor epoch \(t=0\) is set to 2016-07-18 for image 2a of SN Requiem (Rodney et al., 2021 ) , and to 2023-11-17 for image 1a of SN Encore (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SN Encore和SN Requiem多重图像的预测时间延迟和放大率（H0_fixed质量模型）。5 5 5 值报告为来自\(1000\)个采样链的中位数，不确定性对应于\(16\)和\(84\)百分位数。标有*的图像是迄今为止尚未检测到的模型预测图像，原因要么是它们的光度微弱（如图像1c），要么是它们预测的时间延迟较长（如图像1d、1e、2d和2e）。标有†的SN Encore图像1e和SN Requiem图像2e分别出现在\(47\%\)和\(34\%\)的后验样本中；所有其他图像出现在所有样本中。参考锚点历元\(t=0\)设置为SN Requiem图像2a的2016-07-18（Rodney等人，2021），以及SN Encore图像1a的2023-11-17（Pierel等人，2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Predicted reappearance time of image 2d of SN Requiem, expressed as the time delay relative to image 2a, \(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\) . The blue point shows the prediction from the Gravity.jl model presented in this work, while the other points show the predictions from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Horizontal error bars indicate the corresponding \(68\%\) credible intervals. For our model, the interval is derived from \(1000\) posterior samples randomly drawn from the H0_fixed MCMC chains.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：SN Requiem图像2d的预测重现时间，表示为相对于图像2a的时间延迟\(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\)。蓝色点显示了本文提出的Gravity.jl模型的预测，而其他点显示了Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型的预测。水平误差条表示相应的\(68\%\)可信区间。对于我们的模型，该区间来自从H0_fixed MCMC链中随机抽取的\(1000\)个后验样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Comparison of the predicted positions of the multiple images of SN Encore from the Gravity.jl model with those obtained from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Each panel shows one image of SN Encore: the observed images 1a and 1b, and the model-predicted images 1c and 1d. Different symbols and colours correspond to different lens models, as indicated in the legend. The Gravity.jl predictions are shown in blue. The shaded bands show the projected uncertainty region associated with the Gravity.jl prediction. Grey circles denote the observed measured values (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自Gravity.jl模型的SN Encore多重图像预测位置与Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型获得的预测位置的比较。每个面板显示SN Encore的一个图像：观测图像1a和1b，以及模型预测图像1c和1d。不同的符号和颜色对应不同的透镜模型，如图例所示。Gravity.jl预测以蓝色显示。阴影带显示了与Gravity.jl预测相关的投影不确定性区域。灰色圆圈表示观测到的测量值（Pierel等人，2024）。

title: Constraining the Physical Properties of Quadruply Lensed Quasars using Optical-to-X-Ray Data
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Gravitational lensing of luminous active galactic nuclei (AGN; or quasars) can be used as a natural telescope to zoom in on their inner structures. With more and more lensed AGN being discovered, it is extremely important to have a homogeneous study focused on constraining their key physical properties, especially the bolometric luminosity. The primary limitation for such a study is the availability of observations for a representative sample of lensed AGN in at least the optical, ultraviolet (UV), and X-ray bands, where most of the AGN emission is concentrated. In this paper, we present one of the largest multiwavelength studies of lensed AGN with the aim of accurately measuring some of the fundamental quantities, such as their bolometric luminosities, black hole masses, and Eddington ratios. We compiled photometric and spectroscopic data in optical/UV and X-rays, for 27 quadruply lensed AGN ($0.6 < z < 3.1$) and calculated their bolometric luminosities by fitting their broadband spectral energy distributions (SEDs) with phenomenological models. We also performed spectral emission line fitting to estimate their black hole masses using the virial method. Additionally, we compared different prescriptions to calculate the bolometric luminosities of AGN from limited data, and our results show that the luminosity-dependent 2-10 keV X-ray bolometric corrections provide unbiased and reliable predictions of the bolometric luminosity, with a maximum scatter of $\sim 0.5$ dex. The predictions from optical bolometric corrections are generally overestimated but show a lower scatter once microlensing effects are taken into account. Thanks to the compiled optical/UV and X-ray data for our lensed AGN sample, we also present the well-known UV-X-ray luminosity relation for AGN as a novel way to determine uncertainty in the magnifications of lensed AGN induced by micro- and/or millilensing.

AI.tldr: 本文对27个四重引力透镜AGN（红移0.6-3.1）进行了多波段研究，通过SED拟合和发射线测量计算了其辐射光度、黑洞质量和爱丁顿比率，发现基于X射线的辐射修正能可靠预测辐射光度，并提出了利用UV-X射线光度关系确定透镜AGN放大率不确定性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 随着透镜AGN的发现越来越多，需要一项同质化的研究来约束其关键物理性质（尤其是辐射光度），但目前缺乏具有代表性样本在光学、紫外和X射线波段的多波段观测数据。
AI.method: 收集了27个四重透镜AGN的光学/紫外和X射线光度和光谱数据，通过拟合宽带能谱（SED）计算辐射光度，使用维里方法估计黑洞质量，并比较了不同辐射修正方案的预测效果。
AI.result: 基于2-10 keV X射线的光度依赖辐射修正能提供无偏且可靠的辐射光度预测，最大弥散约0.5 dex；光学辐射修正的预测普遍高估，但考虑微引力透镜效应后弥散较低。UV-X射线光度关系可用于确定透镜AGN的放大率不确定性。
AI.conclusion: X射线辐射修正是预测透镜AGN辐射光度的可靠方法，UV-X射线关系为校正微/毫引力透镜放大效应提供了新途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力透镜效应使明亮的活跃星系核（AGN；或类星体）可作为天然望远镜，用于放大其内部结构。随着越来越多的透镜AGN被发现，开展一项同质性研究以约束其关键物理性质（尤其是辐射光度）变得极为重要。此类研究的主要限制在于，至少需要在光学、紫外（UV）和X射线波段（AGN辐射主要集中于此）获得具有代表性的透镜AGN样本的观测数据。本文呈现了迄今最大规模的透镜AGN多波段研究之一，旨在精确测量其基本物理量，如辐射光度、黑洞质量及爱丁顿比。我们收集了27个四重透镜AGN（$0.6 < z < 3.1$）在光学/紫外和X射线波段的光度及光谱数据，并通过用唯象模型拟合其宽波段能谱分布（SEDs）来计算辐射光度。我们还进行了谱线拟合，利用维里法估算其黑洞质量。此外，我们比较了从有限数据计算AGN辐射光度的不同方法，结果表明，依赖于光度的2-10 keV X射线辐射修正能提供无偏且可靠的辐射光度预测，最大弥散约为$\sim 0.5$ dex。光学辐射修正的预测通常偏高，但在考虑微引力透镜效应后弥散较低。得益于所编译的透镜AGN样本的光学/紫外和X射线数据，我们还展示了著名的AGN UV-X射线光度关系，作为确定由微/毫引力透镜引起的透镜AGN放大率不确定性的新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，X射线辐射修正是预测透镜AGN辐射光度的可靠方法，UV-X射线关系为校正微/毫引力透镜放大效应提供了新途径。

title: The Galactic Center as a connected ecosystem across spatial and temporal scales
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, concise meeting report of the Galactic Center workshop 2026 (IAU Symposium 405, https://gc2026.muni.cz/)
summary: The Galactic Center is not only the region where the nearest supermassive black hole (SMBH) is located. It is also the region with the largest stellar density as well as the largest content of molecular gas in the Galaxy. In addition, the conditions of the circumnuclear medium (density, temperature, velocity, magnetic field) across the whole region vary by several orders of magnitude. Although its past evolution is still under debate, the recent Galactic Center workshop (IAU Symposium 405) in Brno, Czech Republic, managed to portray the Galactic Center as a connected ecosystem across spatial and temporal scales. In fact, it can be considered as a ``little galaxy" within the Galaxy on its own and thus serves as a nearby analogue for higher-redshift starburst systems.

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: A group photograph of the IAUS 405 participants. The 6-meter black sphere in the background represents a model of the Galactic Center black hole with the reconstructed Event Horizon Telescope image. The depicted scale represents approximately 5 gravitational radii (for Sgr A*, \(1\,r_{g}\approx 1.9\times 10^{-7}\,{pc}\) , hence the model is constructed in the scale of 1: \(1.5\times 10^{10}\) ). In this scale, most of the participants are inside the tidal radius of the Sun (19 gravitational radii), which is safely outside on the sky. The black-hole model was designed and funded by the Brno Observatory and Planetarium. Photo credit: Lea Szakszonová.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：IAUS 405参与者的集体照。背景中的6米黑色球体代表银河系中心黑洞模型，并叠加了重构的事件视界望远镜图像。所示比例尺约代表5个引力半径（对于Sgr A*，\(1\,r_{g}\approx 1.9\times 10^{-7}\,{pc}\)，因此模型按1:\(1.5\times 10^{10}\)的比例构建）。在此比例下，大多数参与者位于太阳的潮汐半径（19个引力半径）内，这在天空中处于安全范围之外。黑洞模型由布尔诺天文馆和天文台设计并资助。图片来源：Lea Szakszonová。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Complex dynamics in the Galactic Center. Panel a) depicts the innermost region of the Central Molecular Zone, notably Sgr A region with the non-thermal supernova remnant Sgr A East and the thermal Sgr A West with three streamers of the Minispiral. In Sgr A there is the densest cluster of the Galaxy, the Nuclear Star Cluster, with the half-light radius of \(\sim 4.2\) parsecs and the mass of \(\sim 2.5\times 10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) (Schödel et al., 2014 ) . Stellar winds interact with the gaseous-dusty medium to form the diluted region of the Central Cavity. The denser neutral and molecular gas from the CMZ accumulates in the ring-like Circumnuclear disc at \(\sim 2-5\,{pc}\) from Sgr A*. Panel b) in the top right inset shows the innermost part of the Galactic bar where the gas is channelled towards the center along the dust lanes ( \(x_{1}\) orbits). The CMZ forms a loop-like structure with the radius of \(\sim 100\) pc that is perpendicular to the main axis of the bar ( \(x_{2}\) orbits). Within the CMZ there are massive molecular complexes, such as Sgr B1 and B2, 50 and 20 \({km\,s^{-1}}\) clouds, and HII regions, such as Sgr C region. The blue circle represents the region of \(\sim 10\,{pc}\) from Sgr A* (in projection) shown in Panel a).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：银河系中心的复杂动力学。面板a）描绘了中央分子区的最内部区域，特别是Sgr A区域，包括非热超新星遗迹Sgr A East和热Sgr A West，以及迷你螺旋的三条流。在Sgr A中，存在银河系最密集的星团——核星团，其半光半径约为\(\sim 4.2\)秒差距，质量约为\(\sim 2.5\times 10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\)（Schödel et al., 2014）。恒星风与气尘介质相互作用，形成中央空腔的稀释区域。来自CMZ的较稠密中性气体和分子气体在距Sgr A*约\(\sim 2-5\,{pc}\)的环状核周盘中积累。面板b）位于右上角插图中，显示了银河棒的最内部区域，气体沿尘埃带（\(x_{1}\)轨道）向中心输送。CMZ形成一个半径约\(\sim 100\)秒差距的环状结构，垂直于棒的主轴（\(x_{2}\)轨道）。在CMZ内部，存在大质量分子复合体，如Sgr B1和B2、50和20 \({km\,s^{-1}}\)云团，以及HII区域，如Sgr C区域。蓝色圆圈表示面板a）中所示距Sgr A*约\(\sim 10\,{pc}\)（投影）的区域。

title: Overview: Extragalactic Continuum Science with the SKAO
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/Hale01
summary: Radio continuum observations provide a powerful probe of energetic processes that drive galaxy evolution across cosmic time. The combined sensitivity, angular resolution, and survey speed of the SKAO's telescopes will enable transformative advances in extragalactic astronomy by revealing important details into the interplay between star formation, accretion onto supermassive black holes, magnetic fields, and cosmic rays in galaxies and their environments. In this article, we summarize the key science goals of the Extragalactic Continuum Science Working Group and the contributions of related chapters to Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII). For star forming galaxies, this includes using multi-band SKA continuum observations to provide dust-unbiased measurements of the cosmic star-formation history and enable robust spectral energy distribution analyses of star-forming galaxies (SFGs) across cosmic time. This is alongside studies which will be crucial to uncover the physics and duty cycles of active galactic nuclei (AGN), clarify the origin of radio emission in radio-quiet AGN, and probe the co-evolution of black holes and their host galaxies. Moreover, the SKA's sensitivity will also reveal diffuse synchrotron emission in galaxy clusters and the cosmic web, tracing cosmic-ray acceleration within large-scale magnetic fields. Extragalactic continuum studies with the SKA will combine wide area continuum surveys, multi-band studies and imaging over those fields which have an abundance of data across the electromagnetic spectrum. The capabilities of the SKA telescopes will position it as a cornerstone facility for addressing fundamental questions in galaxy formation and evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了SKA射电望远镜在河外连续谱研究中如何通过高灵敏度、高角分辨率和快速巡天能力，推动对恒星形成、黑洞吸积、磁场和宇宙射线等关键过程的认知，涵盖星暴星系、活动星系核、星系团及宇宙网的科学研究目标。
AI.motivation: 利用SKA射电望远镜的高灵敏度和高分辨率，揭示星系演化中恒星形成、黑洞活动、磁场及宇宙射线之间相互作用的关键物理过程。
AI.method: 通过多波段SKA连续谱观测，结合宽场巡天、多波段数据融合以及电磁波谱全覆盖的成像分析，实现无尘埃偏倚的测量和能谱分布建模。
AI.result: SKA能够无偏测量宇宙恒星形成历史、揭示活动星系核的物理与占空比、区分射电宁静AGN的射电辐射起源、探测星系团和宇宙网的弥漫同步辐射。
AI.conclusion: SKA将成为解决星系形成与演化基本问题的核心设施，为河外连续谱天文学带来变革性突破。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电连续谱观测为探测驱动星系在宇宙时标上演化的高能过程提供了有力工具。SKAO望远镜的综合灵敏度、角分辨率和巡天速度将通过揭示恒星形成、超大质量黑洞吸积、磁场以及星系及其环境中的宇宙射线之间相互作用的重要细节，为河外天文学带来变革性进展。本文总结了河外连续谱科学工作组的关键科学目标以及相关章节对《用SKA II推进天体物理学》（AASKAII）的贡献。对于恒星形成星系，这包括利用多波段SKA连续谱观测提供无尘埃偏差的宇宙恒星形成历史测量，并实现对宇宙时标上恒星形成星系（SFGs）的稳健光谱能量分布分析。此外，相关研究对于揭示活动星系核（AGN）的物理机制和占空比、澄清射电宁静AGN中射电辐射的起源，以及探测黑洞与其宿主星系的共同演化至关重要。此外，SKA的灵敏度还将揭示星系团和宇宙网中的弥漫同步辐射，追踪大尺度磁场内的宇宙射线加速。SKA的河外连续谱研究将结合大天区连续谱巡天、多波段研究以及那些拥有丰富电磁波谱数据的区域成像。SKA望远镜的能力将使其成为解决星系形成与演化基本问题的核心设施。

title: The new era of Lyman alpha emitters (LAEs): Typical star formation histories of LAEs in the ILLUSTRIS simulation
comment: Proceedings contribution accepted for publication in the proceedings of the Annual Meeting of the Argentine Astronomical Association (AAA 2025),4 pages, 2 figures
summary: This work seeks to understand the nature of Lyman-alpha emitting galaxies in a cosmological context by analyzing their star-formation histories in the IllustrisTNG100 simulation, applying a recent selection criterion. The sample at z = 2.0 includes 6051 Lyman-alpha emitters, classified into four classes (35%, 33%, 21%, and 11%) using KMeans, an unsupervised machine-learning clustering method. The first class reproduces the typical star-formation history, characterized by the most intense star formation at the time of observation. The remaining classes exhibit atypical star-formation histories, with bursts occurring 0.3, 0.7, and 1.3 Gyr before the time of observation. The first class corresponds to galaxies with lower mass, Lyman-alpha luminosity, and total star-formation rate. We conclude that the classical definition of Lyman-alpha emitting galaxies-low mass, low dust content, and a single dominant burst-remains the most representative population (35% of the total sample), although other classes account for the remaining 65% of the cosmological sample.

AI.tldr: 通过分析IllustrisTNG100模拟中的Lyman-alpha发射星系，发现仅35%符合传统定义（低质量、低尘埃、单次爆发），其余65%呈现不同的恒星形成历史模式。
AI.motivation: 理解Lyman-alpha发射星系在宇宙学背景下的本质，分析其恒星形成历史。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG100模拟，应用最新选择标准，在z=2.0处选取6051个Lyman-alpha发射体，采用KMeans无监督聚类方法将其分为四类。
AI.result: 四类占比分别为35%、33%、21%、11%；第一类符合传统特征，其余三类分别在观测前0.3、0.7、1.3 Gyr经历爆发；第一类对应低质量、低Lyman-alpha光度、低总恒星形成率的星系。
AI.conclusion: 经典定义的Lyman-alpha发射星系（低质量、低尘埃、单次主导爆发）仍是最具代表性的群体（占35%），但其他三类构成了宇宙学样本中65%的星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本研究旨在通过分析IllustrisTNG100模拟中的恒星形成历史，并应用最新的选择标准，从宇宙学角度理解莱曼α发射星系的本质。在红移z=2.0的样本中，包含6051个莱曼α发射体，通过无监督机器学习聚类方法KMeans将其分为四类（占比分别为35%、33%、21%和11%）。第一类再现了典型的恒星形成历史，其特征是在观测时刻恒星形成最为剧烈。其余三类表现出非典型的恒星形成历史，爆发分别发生在观测时刻之前0.3、0.7和1.3 Gyr。第一类对应于质量、莱曼α光度和总恒星形成率较低的星系。我们得出结论：莱曼α发射星系的经典定义——低质量、低尘埃含量和单次主导爆发——仍然是最具代表性的群体（占总样本的35%），尽管其他类别构成了宇宙学样本中剩余的65%。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：经典定义的Lyman-alpha发射星系（低质量、低尘埃、单次主导爆发）仍是最具代表性的群体（占35%），但其他三类构成了宇宙学样本中65%的星系。

title: Extragalactic test of General Relativity with time-delay gravitational lenses
summary: Strong gravitational lensing, a key prediction of General Relativity (GR), offers a unique environment for examining alternative modified gravity theories. In this Letter, we employ a model-independent approach to estimate the parameterized post-Newtonian parameter $γ_{\rm PPN}$ using the time-delay measurements from H0LiCOW strong lensing systems. To minimize potential biases from cosmological models in testing GR, we use Gaussian Process regression (GPR) to reconstruct angular diameter distances ($D_{\rm A}$) from the newest baryon acoustic oscillation (BAO) measurements, provided by the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) DR2 data. Based on the reconstructed angular diameter distances and four H0LiCOW lenses, we directly estimate the post-Newtonian parameter $γ_{\rm PPN}=0.93^{+0.16}_{-0.17}$ and the sound horizon scale $r_{\rm d}=136.36^{+5.14}_{-3.20}~{\rm Mpc}$. This is the first simultaneous measurement of $γ_{\rm PPN}$ and $r_{\rm d}$ without any assumptions about the contents of the universe or the theory of gravity. In the new framework of distance ratio $D_{Δt}/D_{\rm l}$ which avoids the bias introduced by $r_{\rm d}$, the $γ_{\rm PPN}$ constraint can be further improved to $γ_{\rm PPN}=0.89^{+0.19}_{-0.15}$. Our results provide a direct test of GR at the extragalactic scale, which is well consistent with the prediction of GR within $1σ$.

AI.tldr: 本文利用H0LiCOW强引力透镜系统的时延测量和DESI DR2的BAO数据，通过高斯过程回归重建角直径距离，首次在不假设宇宙内容和引力理论的前提下，同时估计了后牛顿参数γ_PPN=0.93^+0.16_-0.17和声视界尺度r_d=136.36^+5.14_-3.20 Mpc，结果与广义相对论在1σ内一致。

AI.method: 采用模型无关的高斯过程回归（GPR），利用DESI DR2最新BAO数据重建角直径距离DA；结合H0LiCOW四个强透镜系统的时延数据，直接估计后牛顿参数γ_PPN和声视界尺度r_d。同时提出新的距离比D_Δt/D_l框架，避免r_d引入的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在不依赖宇宙内容或引力理论假设的情况下同时测量γ_PPN和r_d，为GR在河外尺度提供了直接检验，结果支持GR的有效性。

title: The dependence of Circumgalactic Medium properties on halo assembly histories in the IllustrisTNG simulations
comment: Accepted for publication in The Astrophysical Journal(ApJ)
summary: While halo mass is the dominant factor shaping the embedded galaxies, the properties of the circumgalactic medium (CGM) also depend on halo assembly history. To investigate this, we calculate the formation times for TNG50 halos with masses between $10^{10.5}$ and $10^{12.5} M_\odot$, classifying them into `early-' and `late-forming' populations. It is found that across all mass bins, early-formed halos generally host galaxies with higher stellar mass and higher metallicity, with lower CGM gas mass and lower specific star formation rate (sSFR) at $z\sim0$. For the CGM metallicity, `early' halos with masses below $10^{12}\mathrm{M_\odot}$ show systematically higher gas phase metallicities, whereas in the $10^{12-12.5}\mathrm{M_\odot}$ bin the trend reverses. When examining the origins of the CGM gas, it is found that fresh accretion is insensitive to assembly history, whereas the `late' galaxies experience more wet mergers. These differences in gas properties arise from processes after the formation time, given that the CGM gas masses show no significant differences at formation time. Finally, our analysis of CGM kinematics shows that for halos below $10^{12}\mathrm{M_\odot}$, the cold gas in late-forming halos carries higher specific angular momentum and simply has a higher degree of rotational support, while the same properties in the $10^{12-12.5}\mathrm{M_\odot}$ bin shows no significant dependence on assembly history.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用TNG50模拟，分析了不同形成时间（早形成与晚形成）的暗晕（质量范围$10^{10.5}-10^{12.5} M_\odot$）对其内部星系及周围介质（CGM）性质的影响。
AI.motivation: 暗晕质量虽决定星系基本属性，但CGM性质也受暗晕形成历史影响，本研究旨在量化这一依赖关系。
AI.method: 基于TNG50模拟，计算暗晕形成时间，将暗晕分为早形成和晚形成两类，对比不同质量区间内星系恒星质量、金属丰度、CGM气体质量、恒星形成率、CGM金属丰度、气体来源及运动学特征。
AI.result: 早形成暗晕在$z\sim0$时拥有更高恒星质量、更高金属丰度、更低CGM气体质量和低比恒星形成率；低质量区间早形成暗晕CGM金属丰度更高，但$10^{12-12.5}M_\odot$区间趋势反转；晚形成暗晕经历更多湿并合；CGM气体质量差异形成于形成时间之后；低质量区间晚形成暗晕冷气体旋转支持更强。
AI.conclusion: 暗晕形成历史显著影响星系和CGM性质，且该影响随暗晕质量区间不同而有所差异，CGM性质差异主要源于形成时间之后的过程。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究暗晕形成历史对星系和CGM性质的影响，属于星系形成与演化领域，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣方向无直接关联。论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户重点关注的主题，且作者不在用户核心作者列表中。虽然论文涉及CGM气体和恒星形成率，但属于泛领域重叠，不足以获得高分。

recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用TNG50模拟，用户主要关注观测研究，尤其是利用强引力透镜进行高红移星系研究。

recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文探讨暗晕形成历史对CGM的影响，有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域无关。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 虽然暗晕质量是塑造其内部星系的主导因素，但星系周介质（CGM）的性质也依赖于暗晕的组装历史。为了研究这一点，我们计算了TNG50模拟中质量在$10^{10.5}$到$10^{12.5} M_\odot$之间的暗晕的形成时间，并将其分为“早形成”和“晚形成”两类。研究发现，在所有质量区间内，早形成的暗晕通常拥有恒星质量更高、金属丰度更高的星系，并且在$z\sim0$时具有更低的CGM气体质量和更低的比恒星形成率（sSFR）。对于CGM金属丰度，质量低于$10^{12}\mathrm{M_\odot}$的“早”形成暗晕显示出系统更高的气相金属丰度，而在$10^{12-12.5}\mathrm{M_\odot}$质量区间内，这一趋势发生了反转。在考察CGM气体的来源时，发现新鲜吸积对组装历史不敏感，而“晚”形成星系经历了更多的湿并合。这些气体性质的差异源于形成时间之后的过程，因为CGM气体质量在形成时间时并未显示出显著差异。最后，我们对CGM运动学的分析表明，对于质量低于$10^{12}\mathrm{M_\odot}$的暗晕，晚形成暗晕中的冷气体具有更高的比角动量，并且旋转支撑程度更高，而在$10^{12-12.5}\mathrm{M_\odot}$质量区间内，这些性质对组装历史没有显著依赖。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：暗晕形成历史显著影响星系和CGM性质，且该影响随暗晕质量区间不同而有所差异，CGM性质差异主要源于形成时间之后的过程。

title: Unlocking the Hidden Potential of ALMA Calibrators: A Pilot Blind Search for Galactic Molecular Gas in ALMA Band 1
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures; published in URSI Radio Science Letters
summary: We present a pilot blind absorption line search using calibrator observations with the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) Band 1 receiver (35 GHz to 50 GHz). Radio-loud quasars, commonly used for calibration, provide stable and bright background sources that are ideal for absorption line studies of diffuse interstellar gas. To enable a systematic analysis beyond previous targeted studies, we developed an automated pipeline, from archival data download to statistical identification of absorption line candidates, and applied it to archival ALMA Band 1 observations corresponding to 16 distinct calibrator sources. We statistically identify significant absorption line candidates along the analyzed sightlines. This pilot study demonstrates the feasibility of blind absorption line searches with ALMA Band 1 calibrator data and provides a scalable framework for future large-scale archival surveys.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了一项利用阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）波段1接收机（35 GHz至50 GHz）的校准器观测进行的先导性盲吸收线搜索。常用于校准的射电亮类星体提供了稳定且明亮的背景源，是研究弥散星际气体吸收线的理想选择。为了超越以往针对特定目标的研究，实现系统性分析，我们开发了一条自动化流程，涵盖从档案数据下载到吸收线候选体的统计识别，并将其应用于对应于16个不同校准器源的ALMA波段1档案观测数据。我们沿所分析的视线方向统计识别出显著的吸收线候选体。这项先导性研究证明了利用ALMA波段1校准器数据进行盲吸收线搜索的可行性，并为未来大规模档案巡天提供了可扩展的框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究证明了利用ALMA Band 1校准数据进行盲吸收线搜索的可行性，并为未来大规模档案巡天提供了可扩展框架。

title: CHEX-MATE: AMALGAM weak-lensing analysis of 41 Planck Sunyaev-Zel'dovich-selected galaxy clusters
comment: 33 pages (26 pages plus 7 pages of appendices), 17 figures, 7 tables
summary: We present a weak-lensing shear analysis of 41 Planck SZ-selected galaxy clusters at $0.11\le z\le 0.55$ from the CHEX-MATE sample, using wide-field Subaru/Suprime-Cam and CFHT/MegaPrime imaging from the AMALGAM project. We detect the azimuthally averaged weak-lensing signal around the X-ray peak of each cluster, achieving a median S/N of 6.5 per cluster. The $45^\circ$-rotated component has a median S/N of -0.1 and ranges from -1.8 to +1.8, consistent with zero. We model the excess surface mass density profile of each cluster with an NFW profile to infer weak-lensing mass and concentration constraints. The total systematic uncertainty in the weak-lensing mass calibration is assessed to be $8\%$. Using a hierarchical Bayesian framework, we then derive weak-lensing-calibrated scaling relations for the halo concentration, $c_{200}$, as a function of $M_{200}$ and redshift, and for the Planck SZ mass proxy, $M_{SZ}$, as a function of $M_{500}$ and redshift, while accounting for sample selection effects, weak-lensing modelling biases, and residual calibration uncertainty. At $M_{200}=10^{15}M_\odot$ and $z=0.25$, we find $c_{200}=3.53\pm0.71$ with an intrinsic scatter of $0.22\pm0.04$ dex. The inferred normalisation and scatter are consistent with recent $Λ$CDM predictions for massive haloes, with no significant mass or redshift dependence over the probed range. For the Planck mass proxy, our baseline regression yields $M_{SZ}/M_{500}=0.83\pm0.09$ at $M_{500}=7\times10^{14}M_\odot$ and $z=0.25$, with an intrinsic scatter of $0.10\pm0.02$ dex. A restricted model with fixed unit mass slope and no redshift evolution gives $1-b=0.72\pm0.11$. We also provide weak-lensing-calibrated posterior estimates of $M_{500}$ for the sample based on the baseline $M_{SZ}$--$M_{500}$--$z$ relation. These results provide an initial weak-lensing mass calibration for CHEX-MATE multi-probe cluster studies.

AI.tldr: 本文利用弱引力透镜剪切分析，对41个Planck SZ选出的星系团（CHEX-MATE样本）进行了质量标定，建立了浓度-质量-红移关系和SZ质量代理标定关系，为多探针星系团研究提供了关键质量校准。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用AMALGAM项目的宽场Subaru/Suprime-Cam和CFHT/MegaPrime成像数据，对来自CHEX-MATE样本的41个普朗克SZ选星系团（$0.11\le z\le 0.55$）进行了弱引力透镜剪切分析。我们探测了每个星系团X射线峰值周围的方位角平均弱引力透镜信号，每个星系团的中位信噪比为6.5。$45^\circ$旋转分量的中位信噪比为-0.1，范围从-1.8到+1.8，与零一致。我们使用NFW轮廓对每个星系团的超额表面质量密度轮廓进行建模，以推断弱引力透镜质量和浓度约束。弱引力透镜质量校准的总系统不确定性评估为$8\%$。然后，我们使用分层贝叶斯框架，推导了晕浓度$c_{200}$作为$M_{200}$和红移的函数，以及普朗克SZ质量代理$M_{SZ}$作为$M_{500}$和红移的函数，同时考虑了样本选择效应、弱引力透镜建模偏差和残余校准不确定性。在$M_{200}=10^{15}M_\odot$和$z=0.25$处，我们发现$c_{200}=3.53\pm0.71$，固有弥散为$0.22\pm0.04$ dex。推断的归一化和弥散与近期$Λ$CDM对大质量晕的预测一致，在探测范围内没有显著的质量或红移依赖性。对于普朗克质量代理，我们的基线回归在$M_{500}=7\times10^{14}M_\odot$和$z=0.25$处得到$M_{SZ}/M_{500}=0.83\pm0.09$，固有弥散为$0.10\pm0.02$ dex。一个具有固定单位质量斜率和无红移演化的限制模型给出$1-b=0.72\pm0.11$。我们还基于基线$M_{SZ}$--$M_{500}$--$z$关系，为样本提供了弱引力透镜校准的$M_{500}$后验估计。这些结果为CHEX-MATE多探针星系团研究提供了初步的弱引力透镜质量校准。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：结果与ΛCDM预言一致，提供了CHEX-MATE样本的初步弱透镜质量校准。

title: Bridging Theory and Observation in the SKA Era: A Cosmological Polarized Radiative Transfer Framework for Point-to-Point Polarized Sky Comparisons
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Chan01
summary: Realizing the full scientific potential of the SKA requires not only revolutionary instrumentation but also accurate modeling of light propagation in an evolving, expanding Universe, in order to translate intensity and polarization data into physical insight about magnetic fields and cosmic plasma. When all-sky cosmological polarized radiative transfer (CPRT) calculations meets SKA observations, theory and data interlock to deliver a predictive, and testable picture of the evolving magneto-ionic Universe. This synergy transforms polarization observations -- assembled into empirical maps of diffuse emission and rotation-measure (RM) grids of discrete sources -- from descriptive data products into powerful astrophysical probes, advancing our understanding of cosmic magnetism across space and time. The CPRT formalism -- derived from fundamental conservation laws and incorporating relativistic, cosmological, and full radiative-transfer effects -- provides a robust platform and a common framework for observers, theorists, and simulation experts to pursue shared scientific goals. Observers gain synthetic templates to interpret RM grids and polarization maps; theorists can directly confront models of magnetogenesis and magnetic-field evolution with data; and simulation experts obtain a post-processing tool to transform cosmological magneto-hydrodynamic (MHD) outputs into observable skies. Furthermore, CPRT serves as a powerful testbed when traditional RM-based methods reach their limitations -- for example, in interpreting complex Faraday spectra, disentangling multiple intervening magnetized media, or achieving a coherent picture when diverse observational diagnostics -- such as dispersion measure, synchrotron emission and spectral index, and dust polarization -- are combined.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 实现SKA的全部科学潜力不仅需要革命性的仪器，还需要对演化膨胀宇宙中光传播的精确建模，以便将强度和偏振数据转化为关于磁场和宇宙等离子体的物理洞察。当全天宇宙学偏振辐射传输（CPRT）计算与SKA观测相遇时，理论与数据相互结合，提供了一幅关于演化磁电离宇宙的可预测且可检验的图景。这种协同作用将偏振观测——汇编成弥散辐射的经验图谱和离散源的旋转测量（RM）网格——从描述性数据产品转变为强大的天体物理探针，从而加深我们对宇宙磁场在空间和时间上的理解。CPRT形式体系——源自基本守恒定律，并融合了相对论、宇宙学和完整的辐射传输效应——为观测者、理论家和模拟专家提供了一个稳健的平台和共同框架，以追求共同的科学目标。观测者获得合成模板来解释RM网格和偏振图；理论家可以直接用数据检验磁起源和磁场演化的模型；模拟专家则获得一个后处理工具，将宇宙磁流体动力学（MHD）输出转化为可观测的天空。此外，当传统基于RM的方法达到其局限性时——例如，在解释复杂的法拉第频谱、解开多个介入磁化介质，或结合多种观测诊断（如色散测量、同步辐射和谱指数、尘埃偏振）以获得连贯图景时——CPRT作为一个强大的测试平台发挥作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: An illustration of an all-sky CPRT framework employing a ray-tracing method. The CPRT equation is solved along each light ray (shown in red), which is labelled by three parameters: the cosmological redshift \(z\) , which links to the light travelled distance (or time) and the position on the celestial sky \((\theta,\phi)\) . The observer is located at the center ( \(z=0\) ). .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：采用射线追踪方法的全天CPRT框架示意图。CPRT方程沿每条光线（以红色显示）求解，每条光线由三个参数标记：宇宙学红移 \(z\) ，它与光传播距离（或时间）以及天球上的位置 \((\theta,\phi)\) 相关。观测者位于中心（ \(z=0\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of CPRT data products for various astrophysical studies. Column (i) shows the redshift evolution of \(I\) (intensity), \(Q\) and \(U\) (linear polarization), and \(V\) (circular polarization) along a ray propagating through highly rarefied intergalactic space. The rapid variations in polarization at \(z\lesssim 0.8\) arise from Faraday rotation and conversion as the ray encounters increasingly magnetized and denser structures at lower redshift. Column (ii) presents pencil-beam maps of the degree of linear polarization and the change in polarization angle for a simulated galaxy cluster, showing spatial variations driven by the underlying magneto-ionic structures. Column (iii) displays the all-sky linear polarization predicted by a magnetic universe model, demonstrating CPRT’s ability to connect local plasma processes with global observable signatures. A higher-resolution version of these figures and further details of the underlying model can be found in Chan et al. ( 2019 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于各种天体物理研究的CPRT数据产品示例。第(i)列显示了沿一条穿过高度稀薄星系际空间的光线的 \(I\) （强度）、\(Q\) 和 \(U\) （线偏振）以及 \(V\) （圆偏振）的红移演化。在 \(z\lesssim 0.8\) 处偏振的快速变化源于法拉第旋转和转换，因为光线在较低红移处遇到越来越磁化和致密的结构。第(ii)列展示了模拟星系团的线偏振度和偏振角变化的铅笔束图，显示了由底层磁电离结构驱动的空间变化。第(iii)列显示了由磁宇宙模型预测的全天线偏振，展示了CPRT将局部等离子体过程与全球可观测特征联系起来的能力。这些图的更高分辨率版本以及底层模型的更多细节可在Chan等人（2019）中找到。

title: Radio emission from ultra-diffuse galaxies residing in galaxy clusters
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/Lal01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Ultra-diffuse galaxies (UDGs), defined by their extremely low surface brightness ($g$-band $μ\gtrsim 24$ mag arcsec$^{-2}$) and large effective radii (3--10 arcsec), remain one of the most puzzling galaxy populations in the nearby Universe \citep{vanDokkum2015}. Predominantly found in dense environments, UDGs in the Coma cluster show a preferential alignment of their major axes toward the cluster centre, suggesting strong environmental influence on their formation and evolution. Using high-sensitivity, low-frequency radio data from the upgraded Giant Metrewave Radio Telescope (GMRT), a pathfinder instrument we examined all 854 UDGs cataloged in Coma cluster \citep{Yagi2016}. Despite the unprecedented depth of these observations, no individual detections were made. A median stacking analysis in the upgraded GMRT band-3 achieved a 5 $\times$ \textsc{rms} upper limit $\simeq$1.5~$μ$Jy, providing the most stringent constraint yet on the average (mean) radio emission from UDGs, corresponding to star-formation rates $\lesssim$10$^{-3}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ for Coma-cluster-like systems and $\lesssim$10$^{-1}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ at $z \sim 0.05$. Looking ahead, the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) will transform the study of such faint galaxies. While the early AA$^\star$ configuration will deliver sensitivities comparable to the upgraded GMRT, the AA4 design baseline will achieve sub-$μ$Jy \textsc{rms} levels at matched frequencies ($ν\sim 200$~MHz--1.4~GHz), enabling detections of UDGs with star formation rates as low as 10$^{-4}$--10$^{-3}$~M$_\odot$~yr$^{-1}$ within Virgo and Coma distances. Such capabilities will allow robust discrimination between quenched, dark-matter-dominated systems and those sustaining weak residual star formation or low-luminosity nuclear activity.

AI.tldr: 利用升级版GMRT的深层低频射电数据，对Coma星团854个超弥散星系（UDGs）进行观测，未发现单个探测。通过中值叠加分析，获得了平均射电发射的最严格上限（~1.5 μJy），对应恒星形成率<10^{-3} M⊙/yr（Coma距离）和<10^{-1} M⊙/yr（z~0.05）。未来SKA将能探测到恒星形成率低至10^{-4}-10^{-3} M⊙/yr的UDGs，区分熄灭型暗物质主导系统与弱恒星形成或低光度核活动的系统。
AI.motivation: 超弥散星系（UDGs）是邻近宇宙中最令人困惑的星系族群之一，尤其在Coma星团中展现出沿主轴向星团中心优先排列的特征，暗示环境对其形成和演化有强烈影响。目前对其射电发射特性知之甚少，亟需深层观测来约束其恒星形成活动和中心活动。
AI.method: 使用升级版GMRT（巨米波射电望远镜）Band-3的高灵敏度低频射电数据，观测Coma星团中Yagi等人（2016）编录的全部854个UDGs。采用中值叠加（median stacking）分析方法，以5倍RMS噪声水平设定了平均射电发射的上限。
AI.result: 未在单个UDG中探测到射电发射。通过中值叠加分析，在GMRT Band-3实现了平均射电发射的5倍RMS上限约1.5 μJy。对应Coma星团类似系统的恒星形成率上限<10^{-3} M⊙/yr，对z~0.05的星系上限<10^{-1} M⊙/yr。
AI.conclusion: 当前GMRT数据对Coma星团UDGs的平均射电发射给出了最严格约束，表明这些系统恒星形成活动极弱。未来SKA（平方千米阵列）将实现亚微央斯基级别的灵敏度，能够探测到恒星形成率低至10^{-4}-10^{-3} M⊙/yr的UDGs，从而有效区分熄灭型暗物质主导系统与仍在进行弱恒星形成或存在低光度核活动的系统。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超弥散星系（UDGs）以其极低的表面亮度（g波段μ≳24 mag arcsec⁻²）和较大的有效半径（3–10角秒）为特征，是近邻宇宙中最令人困惑的星系种群之一。它们主要存在于致密环境中，后发星系团中的UDGs显示出其主轴优先朝向星系团中心排列，表明环境对其形成和演化有强烈影响。利用升级后的巨米波射电望远镜（GMRT）的高灵敏度低频射电数据，我们检查了后发星系团中所有854个已编录的UDGs。尽管这些观测具有前所未有的深度，但未发现单个探测。在升级后的GMRT波段3中进行的中值叠加分析获得了5×rms上限≈1.5 μJy，这是对UDGs平均射电发射最严格的约束，对应于后发星系团类似系统的恒星形成率≲10⁻³ M⊙ yr⁻¹，以及在z∼0.05处≲10⁻¹ M⊙ yr⁻¹。展望未来，平方千米阵列（SKA）将彻底改变这类暗弱星系的研究。虽然早期的AA⋆配置将提供与升级后的GMRT相当的灵敏度，但AA4设计基线将在匹配频率（ν∼200 MHz–1.4 GHz）下实现亚微央斯基的rms水平，从而能够探测到室女座和后发座距离内恒星形成率低至10⁻⁴–10⁻³ M⊙ yr⁻¹的UDGs。这种能力将允许在熄灭的暗物质主导系统与维持微弱残余恒星形成或低光度核活动的系统之间进行可靠区分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，当前GMRT数据对Coma星团UDGs的平均射电发射给出了最严格约束，表明这些系统恒星形成活动极弱。未来SKA（平方千米阵列）将实现亚微央斯基级别的灵敏度，能够探测到恒星形成率低至10^{-4}-10^{-3} M⊙/yr的UDGs，从而有效区分熄灭型暗物质主导系统与仍在进行弱恒星形成或存在低光度核活动的系统。

The flux densities from the stacked images are consistent with the expected noise reduction ( \(\approx N^{-1/2}\) ), where \(N\) is the number of images in the stack, confirming that the results are dominated by Gaussian noise rather than faint unresolved sources.
